goal: Show three adversarial planned implementations in HTML during the Plan phase.

plans.title: Plan A - Shell renderer + JSON data
plans.summary: Pure renderer reads plan-options.json and emits self-contained HTML.
verification: bats: section count, no external refs, escaping
plans.critique_of_others: B over-builds a new agent layer; C cannot unit-test model-emitted HTML.

plans.title: Plan B - New agent + validated schema
plans.summary: A dedicated agent emits schema-validated plans; renderer sits on top.
verification: validator accepts valid, rejects invalid fixtures
plans.critique_of_others: A leaves JSON unvalidated; C has no artifact contract at all.

plans.title: Plan C - Orchestrator emits HTML directly
plans.summary: Model writes HTML directly; only new code is a tiny opener.
plans.critique_of_others: A and B both add a renderer + data contract; C is the smallest footprint.
